title: Digital Transformation Manager (m/f/d)
required_skills: Change management / digital transformation project experience
Cross-functional collaboration in a global/matrixed organization
Digital tools and technology adoption experience
matched_skills: Go-to-market strategy (GRG Banking: GTM across 6 product lines; IPC: 4 product launches)
Training and enablement material creation (IPC: training materials for product launches)
Stakeholder management and C-level reporting (HSBC PMO)
Data analysis and reporting (Power BI Certified, KPI framework design)
Cross-functional collaboration in multi-market environments (EMEA, APAC at HSBC)
Technology operations and digital tool adoption (HSBC PMO, Hapag-Lloyd)
Additional languages: Chinese, Cantonese (bonus for international markets)
missing_skills: Explicit change management methodology experience (e.g., PROSCI, ADKAR certification)
Direct experience with construction or industrial digital tools
Formal campaign management / marketing automation platform experience
key_requirements: Drive adoption of Knauf's digital construction tools across regional markets
Partner with regional change owners and market teams to align adoption strategies and track success
Plan and execute go-to-market and promotional campaigns for tool awareness and usage
Create and localize enablement materials including training guides, messaging, and demo content
Analyze user and market data to prioritize improvements with product team
cv_highlights: GTM strategy and multi-product launch execution (GRG Banking, IPC) — directly matches campaign management requirement
Training material creation for 4 product launches at IPC — directly matches enablement content requirement
Multi-market coverage (EMEA, APAC) at HSBC PMO — matches global/matrixed org requirement
Power BI certification and KPI framework design — matches analytical mindset and reporting requirement
Multilingual (English, German, Chinese, Cantonese) — strong differentiator for international market coverage
gaps: No formal change management title or certification (PROSCI/ADKAR); role is labelled 'Change Management'
Munich location vs. Lüneburg (~600 km distance) — relocation or remote arrangement would need clarification
No direct experience in building materials or construction tech domain
recommended_emphasis: Lead with GTM execution track record (GRG Banking: 6 product lines; IPC: 4 launches with training materials)
Emphasize multi-market adoption work at HSBC PMO (EMEA/APAC stakeholder alignment and tracking)
Highlight multilingual capability as competitive advantage for localizing content across markets
Position Power BI and KPI framework work as evidence of analytical rigor for usage/adoption data
Frame technology operations experience as digital adoption facilitation, not just back-office ops
recommendation: Apply with moderate-high confidence. GTM execution, enablement content creation, multilingual profile, and multi-market stakeholder experience are strong matches to the core role. The main gap is the absence of a formal change management title or certification — this should be bridged in the cover letter by framing HSBC PMO and IPC product launch work as de-facto adoption and transformation management. Location (Munich) requires addressing.
